rationale: The cited paper examines social copresence effects on attention to luxury brands using EEG, while the citing paper focuses on optimal design freedom in luxury customization and signaling cues; this indicates topical overlap (luxury/signaling context) but no clear method or direct-result dependence from the notes. Because the only linkage evidence is a single DOI-matched reference with no in-text citation context, the pair cannot be safely dropped but is not clearly substantive.
